sql_array: CREATE TABLE dates(id INTEGER, date_string VARCHAR);
SELECT id, regexp_extract(date_string, '(\d+)-(\d+)-(\d+)', ['y', 'm', 'd']) AS date_parts FROM dates;
UPDATE dates SET date_string = '2024-05-20' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, regexp_extract(date_string, '(\d+)-(\d+)-(\d+)', ['y', 'm', 'd']) AS new_date_parts FROM dates;
